teaser: Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Joy Campbell announced a $175 million settlement with Uber  and Lyft  to secure a $32.50 minimum hourly wage and benefits for drivers. This agreement concludes a multi-year litigation and ensures drivers will receive paid sick leave, health insurance stipends, and occupational accident coverage.
teaserText: Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Joy Campbell announced a $175 million settlement with Uber  and Lyft  to secure a $32.50 minimum hourly wage and benefits for drivers. This agreement concludes a multi-year litigation and ensures drivers will receive paid sick leave, health insurance stipends, and occupational accident coverage.
title: Uber And Lyft Agree To Worker Benefits, Settle State Lawsuit
